Foundation

  • Typography
  • Color System

Architecture

Environments

Strategy

  • Copy Tone
Guideline / Visual Design System

Visual UI System

The complete visible representation of AIPOCH components. Every rule is demonstrated strictly via live HTML components.

1. Typography

H1 Hero text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-normal tracking-tight

We create moments for medical research.

H2 Section text-4xl font-light tracking-tight

Support Your Research 24/7 with Agents.

H3 Card Title text-xl font-medium

Connect with OpenClaw

Body Text text-sm leading-relaxed text-gray-600

AIPOCH is an OpenClaw plugin providing medical research agent skills. Explore structured AI agent skills for evidence insights, protocol design, data analysis, and academic writing in scientific research workflows.

Caption / System (Mono) text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-widest
v2.4.1 - System Initiated successfully

2. Color System

Canvas Flat
#FFFFFFbg-white
Canvas Base
#E8E8E8bg-[#e8e8e8]
Dark Surface
#1A1A1Abg-[#1a1a1a]
Primary Alert
Yellow Accent
#ECD44Cbg-[#ecd44c]

Application Examples

Dark Theme Component

Medical Analysis Engine

Use 1A1A1A for critical system components. Contrast is created entirely through white opacities.

curl -X POST /api/run Execute
Light Theme Component

Data Structures

Rely on severe black borders for brutalist interactions on light canvases.

AIPOCH Protocol v2

3. Icon System

Lucide Core

24x24 frame, 2px stroke, outline only.

Cpu Download SVG
Bot Download SVG
Activity Download SVG
Info Download SVG
Github Download SVG
Layout Download SVG

4. Buttons & UI Components

Button Styles

Primary Solid
Secondary Outline
Primary Brutal

Structural Cards & Chips

Neutral Tag Warning Tag

Financial Analysis

Automated dataset parsing.

5. Spacing & Grid Definition

Padding: p-8 (32px)
Gap: gap-12 (48px)
Element 1
Element 2

12-Column Desktop Grid max-w-6xl

Visual Hero / col-span-8

6. Social Media (4:5)

Post Composition Rules

Designed strictly for vertical feeds (LinkedIn, IG). Requires absolute typographic centeredness with extreme safe margins.

Safe Padding p-12 / p-16
Logo / URL Root absolute bottom-8
Safe Zone

Unlock
Medical
Intelligence

AIPOCH Protocol v2.4

AIPOCH

7. Banner Systems (2:1 / 3:1)

LinkedIn Cover & Web Heros

Web / Horizontal

The new standard for clinical data agents.

Deploy fully verified medical AI skills in seconds. Completely private.

8. Image Style Definition

1. Abstract Over Literal

Use gradients, geometry, and UI mockups instead of generic stock photos of laboratories.

Heavy Noise

2. Cold Textures

Introduce film grain and digital artifacts to ground the imagery in an authentic software feel.

3. Component Floating

Isolate UI components with drop shadows on stark 3D neutral backgrounds.

9. Copy Tone Application

Hero Headlines

Deploy Medical AI Models Locally.

Calm & Factual

The ULTIMATE Med-Tech Revolution!

Hyped & Desperate

CTA & Micro-Copy

Verbs must be action-oriented and clinical (Start, View, Analyze, Deploy). Avoid casual verbs like "Grab", "Check Out", or "See".
